channel.title: Jonathan's Bookmarks Digest
channel.description: A private, daily-ish audio digest of what Jonathan saves to read — X bookmarks, web articles, and the occasional paper — read aloud in full and woven by theme, with clickable chapters per item.
channel.itunes:author: Bookmarks Digest
channel.itunes:summary: Your reading, read aloud and chaptered.

item.title: Voice Auditions — pick your cast
item.description: Same sample read by each candidate voice — chapter title names the voice. Pick: two distinct INDIAN FEMALES (narrator + main reader) and one POSH BRITISH FEMALE (block-quotes). Providers: ElevenLabs, Kokoro (local/on-device), Apple.
item.content:encoded: Same sample read by each candidate voice — chapter title names the voice. Pick: two distinct INDIAN FEMALES (narrator + main reader) and one POSH BRITISH FEMALE (block-quotes). Providers: ElevenLabs, Kokoro (local/on-device), Apple.

item.title: June 17, 2026 — The Fable Files
item.description:
Your bookmarks for the day, read in full and woven by theme.
Sources: • Dean W. Ball: @segyges Because a ruling that protects AI under… — https://x.com/deanwball/status/2067054232411222197 • Neil Chilson ⤴️⬆️🆙📈 🚀: New reporting on the Fable/Mythos story links last… — https://x.com/neil_chilson/status/2066933825850994877 • David Sacks: Some recent articles have created a misleading narrative… — https://x.com/DavidSacks/status/2067270499458027832 • rahul: 1. as a mental model it is more… — https://x.com/rahulgs/status/2067257255825686880 • Tyler Cowen: Tyler Cowen: A Dangerous Turn in AI Regulation — https://www.thefp.com/p/tyler-cowen-a-dangerous-turn-in-ai ↳ linked: Tyler Cowen: A Dangerous Turn in AI Regulation — https://www.thefp.com/p/tyler-cowen-a-dangerous-turn-in-ai • Zvi Mowshowitz: The Once And Future Fable #2 — https://thezvi.substack.com/p/the-once-and-future-fable-2 ↳ linked: The Once And Future Fable #2 — https://thezvi.substack.com/p/the-once-and-future-fable-2 • James Pethokoukis ⏩️⤴️: Meet the world’s top AI-pilled economists "This year… — https://x.com/JimPethokoukis/status/2066661774028357724 • Ethan Mollick: Big issue with AI strategies at big companies… — https://x.com/emollick/status/2067344183870836985 • Ethan Mollick: What it feels like to work with Mythos — https://www.oneusefulthing.org/p/what-it-feels-like-to-work-with-mythos ↳ linked: What it feels like to work with Mythos — https://www.oneusefulthing.org/p/what-it-feels-like-to-work-with-mythos • signüll: meta is narratively homeless. they own the largest… — https://x.com/signulll/status/2067279134632325535 • Rolfe Winkler: Exclusive | Apple to Raise Prices Due to Memory Chip Crunch, Tim Cook Says — https://www.wsj.com/tech/apple-price-increases-memory-supply-199845b1?mod=WSJ_home_mediumtopper_pos_1 ↳ linked: Exclusive | Apple to Raise Prices Due to Memory Chip Crunch, Tim Cook Says — https://www.wsj.com/tech/apple-price-increases-memory-supply-199845b1?mod=WSJ_home_mediumtopper_pos_1 • Noah Smith: Will China, Inc. be zombified? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/will-china-inc-be-zombified ↳ linked: Will China, Inc. be zombified? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/will-china-inc-be-zombified • Noah Smith: Are you finally ready to admit it's the phones? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/are-you-finally-ready-to-admit-its ↳ linked: Are you finally ready to admit it's the phones? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/are-you-finally-ready-to-admit-its • Seth Frantzman: Israel's Smart Shooter to Supply additional SMASH Hopper… — https://x.com/sfrantzman/status/2066933117932200219 • Visegrád 24: 🇫🇷 A French woman who was sexually assaulted… — https://x.com/visegrad24/status/2067228528152601082 • Reuven Goldstein: Born in 1824 to a Jewish family in… — https://x.com/curatorWH/status/2067008622757028298 • Reuven Goldstein: Albert Einstein received a historic ticker tape parade… — https://x.com/curatorWH/status/2067278955921723589 • download.ssrn.com: https://download.ssrn.com/2026/6/5/6663038.pdf?response-cont — https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6663038
Chapters: 00:00 Intro 00:45 Dean W. Ball — @segyges Because a ruling that protects AI under… 01:10 Neil Chilson — New reporting on the Fable/Mythos story links last… 01:33 David Sacks — Some recent articles have created a misleading narrative… 05:45 Rahul — A mental model for the new models 10:21 Tyler Cowen — Tyler Cowen: A Dangerous Turn in AI Regulation 19:57 Zvi Mowshowitz — The Once And Future Fable #2 64:04 James Pethokoukis — Meet the world’s top AI-pilled economists "This year… 64:29 Ethan Mollick — Big issue with AI strategies at big companies… 64:53 Ethan Mollick — What it feels like to work with Mythos 77:01 signüll — meta is narratively homeless. they own the largest… 77:44 Rolfe Winkler — Exclusive | Apple to Raise Prices Due to Memory Chip Crunch, Tim Cook Says 87:30 Noah Smith — Will China, Inc. be zombified? 108:19 Noah Smith — Are you finally ready to admit it's the phones? 120:22 Seth Frantzman — Israel's Smart Shooter to Supply additional SMASH Hopper… 120:48 Visegrád 24 — A French woman who was sexually assaulted… 121:21 Reuven Goldstein — Born in 1824 to a Jewish family in… 121:42 Reuven Goldstein — Albert Einstein received a historic ticker tape parade… 122:05 AI & Productivity — a new paper (essay)
item.content:encoded:
Your bookmarks for the day, read in full and woven by theme.
Sources: • Dean W. Ball: @segyges Because a ruling that protects AI under… — https://x.com/deanwball/status/2067054232411222197 • Neil Chilson ⤴️⬆️🆙📈 🚀: New reporting on the Fable/Mythos story links last… — https://x.com/neil_chilson/status/2066933825850994877 • David Sacks: Some recent articles have created a misleading narrative… — https://x.com/DavidSacks/status/2067270499458027832 • rahul: 1. as a mental model it is more… — https://x.com/rahulgs/status/2067257255825686880 • Tyler Cowen: Tyler Cowen: A Dangerous Turn in AI Regulation — https://www.thefp.com/p/tyler-cowen-a-dangerous-turn-in-ai ↳ linked: Tyler Cowen: A Dangerous Turn in AI Regulation — https://www.thefp.com/p/tyler-cowen-a-dangerous-turn-in-ai • Zvi Mowshowitz: The Once And Future Fable #2 — https://thezvi.substack.com/p/the-once-and-future-fable-2 ↳ linked: The Once And Future Fable #2 — https://thezvi.substack.com/p/the-once-and-future-fable-2 • James Pethokoukis ⏩️⤴️: Meet the world’s top AI-pilled economists "This year… — https://x.com/JimPethokoukis/status/2066661774028357724 • Ethan Mollick: Big issue with AI strategies at big companies… — https://x.com/emollick/status/2067344183870836985 • Ethan Mollick: What it feels like to work with Mythos — https://www.oneusefulthing.org/p/what-it-feels-like-to-work-with-mythos ↳ linked: What it feels like to work with Mythos — https://www.oneusefulthing.org/p/what-it-feels-like-to-work-with-mythos • signüll: meta is narratively homeless. they own the largest… — https://x.com/signulll/status/2067279134632325535 • Rolfe Winkler: Exclusive | Apple to Raise Prices Due to Memory Chip Crunch, Tim Cook Says — https://www.wsj.com/tech/apple-price-increases-memory-supply-199845b1?mod=WSJ_home_mediumtopper_pos_1 ↳ linked: Exclusive | Apple to Raise Prices Due to Memory Chip Crunch, Tim Cook Says — https://www.wsj.com/tech/apple-price-increases-memory-supply-199845b1?mod=WSJ_home_mediumtopper_pos_1 • Noah Smith: Will China, Inc. be zombified? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/will-china-inc-be-zombified ↳ linked: Will China, Inc. be zombified? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/will-china-inc-be-zombified • Noah Smith: Are you finally ready to admit it's the phones? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/are-you-finally-ready-to-admit-its ↳ linked: Are you finally ready to admit it's the phones? — https://www.noahpinion.blog/p/are-you-finally-ready-to-admit-its • Seth Frantzman: Israel's Smart Shooter to Supply additional SMASH Hopper… — https://x.com/sfrantzman/status/2066933117932200219 • Visegrád 24: 🇫🇷 A French woman who was sexually assaulted… — https://x.com/visegrad24/status/2067228528152601082 • Reuven Goldstein: Born in 1824 to a Jewish family in… — https://x.com/curatorWH/status/2067008622757028298 • Reuven Goldstein: Albert Einstein received a historic ticker tape parade… — https://x.com/curatorWH/status/2067278955921723589 • download.ssrn.com: https://download.ssrn.com/2026/6/5/6663038.pdf?response-cont — https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6663038
Chapters: 00:00 Intro 00:45 Dean W. Ball — @segyges Because a ruling that protects AI under… 01:10 Neil Chilson — New reporting on the Fable/Mythos story links last… 01:33 David Sacks — Some recent articles have created a misleading narrative… 05:45 Rahul — A mental model for the new models 10:21 Tyler Cowen — Tyler Cowen: A Dangerous Turn in AI Regulation 19:57 Zvi Mowshowitz — The Once And Future Fable #2 64:04 James Pethokoukis — Meet the world’s top AI-pilled economists "This year… 64:29 Ethan Mollick — Big issue with AI strategies at big companies… 64:53 Ethan Mollick — What it feels like to work with Mythos 77:01 signüll — meta is narratively homeless. they own the largest… 77:44 Rolfe Winkler — Exclusive | Apple to Raise Prices Due to Memory Chip Crunch, Tim Cook Says 87:30 Noah Smith — Will China, Inc. be zombified? 108:19 Noah Smith — Are you finally ready to admit it's the phones? 120:22 Seth Frantzman — Israel's Smart Shooter to Supply additional SMASH Hopper… 120:48 Visegrád 24 — A French woman who was sexually assaulted… 121:21 Reuven Goldstein — Born in 1824 to a Jewish family in… 121:42 Reuven Goldstein — Albert Einstein received a historic ticker tape parade… 122:05 AI & Productivity — a new paper (essay)
